text:
- Tinderbox log:

  http://tb.gslin.org/logs/4.11-FreeBSD/p5-NNML-1.14.log
  http://tb.gslin.org/logs/4.11-FreeBSD-Perl5/p5-NNML-1.14.log (later)
  http://tb.gslin.org/logs/4.11-FreeBSD-Perl58/p5-NNML-1.14.log
  http://tb.gslin.org/logs/5.5-FreeBSD/p5-NNML-1.14.log
  http://tb.gslin.org/logs/6-STABLE/p5-NNML-1.14.log

NNML::Server server implements a minimal NNTP server. It is (hope-)
fully conformant to rfc977. In addition the commands XOVER and
AUTHINFO are implemented.

Author:	Ulrich Pfeifer <pfeifer@ls6.informatik.uni-dortmund.de>
WWW:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/NNML/

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
